docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,079.23 FILED BY WANG, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MACIAS, ROSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT MACIAS, ROSA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED JAN-08-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACIAS, ROSA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
